seo.title: Mortgage Broker in Brooklyn NY | Green Street Capital
seo.description: Brooklyn-based mortgage broker for purchase, refinance, first-time buyers, Non-QM, and investment loans. Local office on Coney Island Ave. NMLS #2066586.

hero.heading: Mortgage Broker in Brooklyn
hero.subheading: Local expertise from our Coney Island Avenue office—helping Brooklyn buyers and homeowners finance with clarity.

intro.heading: Brooklyn Home Financing
paragraphs: Brooklyn’s neighborhoods—from Bay Ridge and Sheepshead Bay to Williamsburg, Park Slope, and beyond—each come with different price points, co-op/condo rules, and rental demand. Green Street Capital is headquartered in Brooklyn and works with borrowers who want a broker that understands the local market.
Whether you are a first-time buyer, self-employed professional, or investor, we review your full financial picture and present practical program options.
bullets: First-time buyers in competitive Brooklyn neighborhoods
Families purchasing multi-family homes with rental income
Condo and co-op purchasers needing board-ready files
Homeowners refinancing after rate or equity changes

sidebar.heading: Visit Us in Brooklyn
sidebar.body: 2709 Coney Island Ave, 3rd Floor, Brooklyn, NY 11235. Call 718-615-4545 or toll-free 855-615-4545.

programs.title: Purchase Loans
programs.description: Conventional, FHA, VA, and jumbo options for one- to four-family homes and condos.

programs.title: First-Time Buyer Paths
programs.description: Guidance on down payment, reserves, and program choice for new homeowners.

programs.title: Bank Statement & Non-QM
programs.description: Solutions when standard W-2 underwriting does not reflect your cash flow.

programs.title: Multi-Family & Investment
programs.description: Financing strategies for 2–4 unit properties and investor cash-flow loans.

programs.title: Refinance
programs.description: Rate-and-term or cash-out refinance when your goals support it.

programs.title: Co-op & Condo
programs.description: Support for financing structures common across Brooklyn housing stock.

market.heading: Buying in Brooklyn
paragraphs: Strong demand and varied building types mean underwriting details matter. We help you prepare documentation early so contract-to-close stays on track.
Taxes, insurance, and HOA or maintenance fees vary widely by neighborhood—model the full payment before you stretch your budget.

faqs.question: Where is Green Street Capital located in Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: 2709 Coney Island Ave, 3rd Floor, Brooklyn, NY 11235.

faqs.question: Do you only serve southern Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: No. We work with clients across Brooklyn neighborhoods and the wider New York metro area where licensed.

faqs.question: Can self-employed Brooklyn borrowers apply?
faqs.answer: Yes. We frequently help self-employed and 1099 borrowers explore bank statement and Non-QM options.

cta.heading: Talk to a Brooklyn mortgage team
cta.body: Schedule time with a loan officer or start your application today.
